scenarios.description: parse("2147483648.0.0") returns null when major version overflows Integer.MAX_VALUE
pseudocode: assert result == null; // parsing should catch NumberFormatException and return null

scenarios.description: parse("01.02.03") returns null when numeric identifiers have leading zeros
pseudocode: String version = "01.02.03"; // invalid: leading zeros in numeric identifiers
assert result == null; // parser should reject leading zeros
